name_en: Large Size "Export Product" 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality 🔮🔮🔮 Price is a bit high 😯 Ohanel 25A "Dark Horse" Backpack. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, with a large internal patch pocket. Retro matte gold hardware, large capacity, fits daily items 👍🏻. Has a handle for hand carrying, and a short leather chain strap, the long shoulder strap is adjustable. Size: 18*24*6cm/5347
